name: vendor.myndhyve.web-research
description: MyndHyve web-research pack — 4 nodes for the search → fetch → research → synthesize pipeline. webSearch + fetchUrls + researchWeb route through the host's webResearch adapter (search API + scraping policy + rate-limit + cache layer); synthesize composes results into a typed envelope via the AI envelope surface.
author: MyndHyve

nodes.label: Web Search
nodes.description: Issues a search query through the host's search adapter (Google CSE / Bing / Brave / Perplexity / etc.). Returns top results with title + URL + snippet. Side-effectful (external call costs money + rate-limited) + cacheable (engine Layer-2 caches by query+filters).

nodes.label: Fetch URLs
nodes.description: Fetches a batch of URLs concurrently with research-specific policy (robots.txt respect, content-type filtering, body size caps, readability extraction). Returns per-URL content + status + extracted text. Different from core.openwop.http.fetch — that's a single request with raw response; this is bulk scraping with extraction.

nodes.label: Research Web
nodes.description: End-to-end research operation: query → search → fetch top N results → extract → return citation-ready content. Higher-level than webSearch + fetchUrls; useful when workflow authors don't need to inspect intermediate results.

nodes.label: Synthesize Research
nodes.description: AI-synthesis step: takes research results (from webSearch + fetchUrls or researchWeb) and synthesizes a typed envelope (e.g., `research.summary`, `competitor.profile`). Pins citations to the source URLs. Routes through ctx.aiEnvelope.generate.
